title: Slide Library
description: Browse slides from ingested templates, filter by review status, explore classification metadata, and discover similar content across your library.

steps.narration: Welcome to the Slide Library. This grid shows every slide extracted from your ingested templates. Along the top you can see filter tabs -- All, Unreviewed, Approved, and Needs Correction -- each with a count so you know exactly how many slides are in each review state.

Each slide card displays a thumbnail, slide number, and a color-coded status badge -- green for Approved, amber for Unreviewed, and red for Needs Correction. Below the thumbnail you'll see the template name it came from, a confidence percentage, and classification chips in blue for industry and purple for solution pillar.
Let's filter to just the approved slides. Click the Approved tab and the grid instantly narrows to only slides that have been reviewed and confirmed.
Now select the Needs Correction filter. Slides flagged here had their AI classification marked for human review -- someone needs to verify or fix the metadata before they're used in deck generation.
Let's go back to the full view. Click All to see every slide in the library again.

Notice the template name on each card -- slides come from templates like Cloud Transformation Proposal, Customer Success Case Studies, and Technical Architecture Overview. Each template was registered in the Template Library and ingested by the AI to populate these slides.
Every slide card has a Find Similar button. Click it to discover related content across your entire template library -- useful when you're looking for alternative slides on the same topic.

The similarity modal shows slides from across your templates that share related content. This is powerful for content discovery -- you might find a case study from one template that pairs perfectly with an architecture slide from another.

Close the modal and you're back on the grid. Keep in mind that the slides here are the building blocks the AI uses when generating decks -- the richer your Template Library, the more options the system has to choose from.

That's the Slide Library. Use the filter tabs to triage review status, check classification metadata on each card, and discover related slides with Find Similar. It all feeds into smarter, more personalized deck generation.
